{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Strigaia tribe
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Strigaia tribe]] has [[Avernus Travelers]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c13">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate groups]]
